assumptions: The developer has a supported browser and can receive email when the selected route requires it.
No platform account, tenant, credentials, or product resources exist yet.

developer_goal: Create a Stability AI Developer Platform account with free credits and an API key, then run Stable Image Core until lighthouse.webp is saved.

first_success.outcome: The Stable Image Core sample returns HTTP 200 and saves the generated lighthouse image as lighthouse.webp.
first_success.observable_signal: A non-empty lighthouse.webp file is written locally after HTTP 200.

route_selection.surface: Stability AI Developer Platform Stable Image Core REST sample
route_selection.rule: Reconstruct complete official candidate routes, prefer no payment/admin/approval when possible, then minimize required actions; leave consequential ties unresolved.

candidates.name: Google social login for free credits then Stable Image Core Python sample
candidates.reason: Google consent and account-convergence states are not fully public; username/password route grants different credit positioning.

candidates.name: Username and password signup then purchase or use credits
candidates.reason: Official docs state Google social login grants 25 free credits; email route credit grant is not equivalently evidenced.

required_path.action: Create a Developer Platform account via Login.

required_fields.label: Google account consent when choosing social login

required_path.observable_result: The developer is authenticated to the Developer Platform.

required_path.action: Create an API key on the API Keys page.
required_path.observable_result: An API key value is available for Authorization headers.

required_path.action: Run the Stable Image Core sample that writes lighthouse.webp.

required_fields.label: Stable Image Core request sample execution

required_path.observable_result: HTTP 200 response and lighthouse.webp are saved.

prerequisites.description: Credits are required to call generation APIs; free credits depend on signup method.

external_gates.description: Google identity-provider authorization for the social signup route.

platform_outcomes.description: Stability AI issues API keys and consumes credits on successful generation.

excluded.item: Purchasing additional credits after free balance is depleted
excluded.reason: Occurs after first successful generation if free credits remain.

sources.title: Where can I find my API Key?

uncertainties.question: Does the username/password signup route grant the same free credits as Google login?
uncertainties.impact: Changes whether payment is required before first generation.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Official credit-grant comparison for both signup methods on a fresh account.

uncertainties.question: What exact Google consent and post-login states appear before the API Keys page?
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Fresh-account walkthrough from Login through first API key.
